g.text: A scheduled task service is a web service that lets users create a timer by providing a URL and a delay in hours, minutes, and seconds.

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: When the timer expires, the service calls the given URL. It also lets users query how much time is left for a timer.

g.text: NOTICE: For this assessment I choose PostgreSQL over DynamoDB because:

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: — I am not Completely hands-on on DynamoDB

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: — Postgres is fine for a practical first version,

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: then call out that DynamoDB becomes the safer default if massive write scale

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: — DynamoDB is a key-value NoSQL DB that can easily scale horizontally,

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: also manage-less and built for massive write throughput

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: — With PostgreSQL I should be careful about throughput around ~10k Task/s

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: — future looking | task should be run within 5m | sleep(4.9m) -> down

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: for Dozens of Task it would be relatively large 10k-20k and

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: would burn 2s threshold even with proper indexing some ±500ms

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: running this expensive query every 2s will overwhelm DB

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: If I query timers that needed to execute in the next 5m and put them on MSQ

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Meanwhile a User `create 00:01:00, URL` -> right on the Queue, fine!

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: But many MSQ are Log-based and ordered (FIFO) like Kafka Append-Only-Log-File | Disk Based

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: So I can not reprioritize it 5

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Finally `create 00:01:00, URL` -> will execute in 5m or 5m and couple of second

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: We need Something in memory operate as priority queue or as heap

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - Redis Sorted Set -> heapify -> timer will put to right spot

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: If so we need read replicas and Sentinel high availability mode, one master 2 replica, auto failover and ...

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - RabbitMQ: provide this delayed message exhange

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: is not typically trusted as heavily for production systems

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - SQS: has delivery delay up to 15 meniutes can handle heapification

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: makes RETRIES a lot easier. support DLQs. High Availability
